user.title: Lexus Connected Services
user.description: Enter your MyLexus / Lexus Link (Toyota Connected Europe) credentials. Only EU accounts are supported.

lexus_vehicle.title: Select vehicle
lexus_vehicle.description: More than one vehicle was found. Choose the Lexus UX300e you want to track.

options.title: Update mode
options.description: Choose how Home Assistant should fetch data from Lexus Connected Services.

scan_interval.title: Polling interval
scan_interval.description: How often (in minutes) should Home Assistant read the data from Lexus Connected Services?

error.invalid_auth: Invalid Lexus credentials. Please check your email and password.
error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to Lexus Connected Services. Check your network and try again.
error.missing_library: The pytoyoda library is not installed. Restart Home Assistant after installation.
error.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. See the Home Assistant logs for details.

init.title: Update mode
init.description: Choose how Home Assistant should fetch data from Lexus Connected Services.

scan_interval.title: Polling interval
scan_interval.description: How often (in minutes) should Home Assistant read the data from Lexus Connected Services?
